name: confirm-remove-service-drops-just-that-one
description: Confirm-edit op semantics: 'Remove waxing' should drop only waxing from the services list, leaving everything else intact. The LLM emits op=remove and applyListOpLocal handles the diff. Also covers the no-op case implicitly (if the list didn't have waxing, the edit returns null label and the bot doesn't falsely claim success).
